REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-26-2007 - CASE SETTLED IN DEPT. 218 OF THE SUPERIOR COURT. THE PARTIES EACH APPEARED IN PRO PER AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF: WILLIE RATCLIFF AND DEFENDANT: KENNETH MCCLAIN. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT IS MEMORIALIZED IN OPEN COURT AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SHALL VACATE THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 4919-A - 3RD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, 94124 BY JANUARY 25, 2008 5:00 PM AND HE WILL OWE NO RENT. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE AS AFORESAID, DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST HIM IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,200 AND PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED IN HIS FAVOR FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMSISES LOCATED AT 4919-A - 3RD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, 94124. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE BRANT; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE; COURTROOM CLERK: DON FEINBERG

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar for settlement conference this day in Dept. 218 of the Superior Court. The parties each appeared in pro per as follows: Plaintiff: Willie Ratcliff and Defendant: Kenneth McClain.

Stipulation for entry of judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant is memorialized in open court as follows: Defendant shall vacate the premises located at 4919-A - 3rd Street, San Francisco, 94124 by January 25, 2008 5:00 PM and he will owe no rent.

If defendant fails to vacate as aforesaid, defendant shall have judgment entered against him in the amount of $1,200 AND plaintiff shall have Judgment entered in his favor for immediate possession of the premsises located at 4919-A - 3rd Street, San Francisco, 94124. Each party to bear their own costs.

Judge Pro Tem: Michelle Brant
Reporter: Susan Lee
Courtroom Clerk: Don Feinberg
